Coming Events

May 1994
Journalism & Newsroom

A listing of upcoming journalism conferences and training events including the IRE National Conference, NICAR Training Seminar, and IRE Computer-Assisted Reporting Conference scheduled across multiple cities in 2024.

Coming Events

June 16-19 IRE National Conference St. Louis, Missouri August 14-19 NICAR Training Seminar Columbia, Missouri October 6-9 IRE Computer-Assisted Reporting Conference San Jose, California
